<!-- satisfies IR-01, IR-02 -->
Thanks for the suggestion. Feature requests help shape the direction of this project.

To help evaluate this request, it would be useful to know:

- **The problem it solves** — what workflow or gap does this address?
- **Proposed behavior** — what would the feature do, and how would it work?
- **Alternatives considered** — have you found workarounds or similar tools?

No timeline commitments are made for feature requests, but all feedback is read and considered. If this is time-sensitive or blocking important work, please say so in the issue and it will be prioritized accordingly.
